steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that specifies Avery Johnson's contribution to India Arie's music. The notes state he 'played bass on the album.' The correct choice must name that specific role.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘India Arie is an African American singer and songwriter whose music has been described as a blend of hip hop, soul and folk [that is] as subtle as it [is] inspired.’: does not mention Avery Johnson at all. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Acoustic Soul, India Arie's first studio album, features Avery Johnson.’: mentions Johnson but does not specify what he contributed. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Featuring the song "Back to the Middle," Acoustic Soul is India Arie's first studio album.’: does not mention Avery Johnson at all. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Avery Johnson played bass on India Arie's 2001 album Acoustic Soul.’: states directly that Johnson played bass on India Arie's 2001 album — the exact contribution named in the notes. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
